framework.name: Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) Authorization Framework
framework.description: Google's open protocol using cryptographically-signed 'Mandates' as tamper-proof digital contracts that establish authorization boundaries for AI agents. Distinguishes between Intent Mandates (user's request with constraints like price limits, timing) and Cart Mandates (final approved transaction). Creates non-repudiable audit trail from intent → cart → payment to prove authorization, authenticity, and establish accountability.
framework.raw_quote: Mandates are tamper-proof, cryptographically-signed digital contracts that serve as verifiable proof of a user's instructions... For delegated tasks, you sign a detailed Intent Mandate upfront specifying price limits, timing, and other conditions. It serves as verifiable, pre-authorized proof that can allow the agent to automatically generate a Cart Mandate on your behalf once your precise conditions are met.
